description: Style NoteVintage style on classic Indian sandals from catwalk. The brand combines a minimal style with classic vintage with this pair. Wear this with boho ensembles or with ethnic wear.Product DetailsBrown sandal with thong style snake print upper with eyelets in ring details and a toe separatorSmooth footbed with design detail on the periphery of the footbedTextured rubber outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heel in a floral shapeMaterial and Care  SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
